test-method.name: validateBlankFieldValidations
test-method.description: Validate login with fields & check validation message

exception.message: Validation Message is not displayed expected [null] but found [*Email is required]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Validation Message is not displayed expected [null] but found [*Email is required] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: validateWrongUserNameOrPassword
test-method.description: Validate login security for wrong username and password

test-method.name: loginUsingCorrectCredentials
test-method.description: Validate login with correct username and password
